"[4] [Appended, 13:39:57] [2] [Appended, 13:38:59] [1] WHI MERZ GLC VS UNK OTHER VEH "
"[18] ^CT644-1 -- HIS SUPV MADE NOTIFICATIONS TO THE CONST PROJECTS DOING NIGHT WORK IN THE AREA; UNK WHEN THE REPAIR WILL BE MADE BUT WILL LIKELY BE DELAYS AT THE I-SEC'S OVER THE WEEKEND "
"[17] ^CT644-1 -- BOTH CT and COUNTY WORKED TO FIND A TEMP SOLUTION, BUT W/OUT REPAIR TO THE COMMUNICATION LINE THEY CANNOT DO MUCH ELSE"
"[16] ^CT644-1 -- THAT COMMUNICATION LINE IS WHAT FACILITATES THE 2 SIGNALS SYNCING CORRECTLY W/ EACH OTHER; SINCE IT'S DMG'D, THE 2 SIGNALS ARE NOT ABLE TO CYCLE IN THE MOST EFFICIENT WAY"

"[15] ^CT644-1 -- COUNTY HAS BEEN ON SCENE COORDINATING/WORKING W/ CT TODAY; BTWN THE 2 AGENCIES THEY WERE ABLE TO DISCOVER THAT THE COMMUNICATION LINE BTWN STATE'S SIGNAL (67/MAPLEVIEW) and COUNTY'S SIGNAL (MAINE/MAPLEVIEW) WAS DMG'D BY 1 OF THE 2 ONGOING CONST PROJECTS IN THE AREA"

"[5] [Notification] [CHP]-1039 SD CORDS; THEY ADV'D THAT AN ENGINEER WENT OUT YESTERDAY TO MAPLEVIEW AT MAINE AND STATED THAT IT'S A CT ISSUE AT 67/ MAPLEVIEW / THEY CPY THAT CT STATES THAT THE ISSUE IS MAPLEVIEW AT MAINE / WILL 1039 THE SD CORDS ENGINEER AGAIN AND HAVE THEM RE-ASSESS"
"[4] ^CT644-1 CPZ THE ADDL CALL, HE'S 97 IN THE AREA / WILL BE CHK'ING CT'S SIGNAL CABINET AGAIN"
"[1] OFR UNK COLOR PK PULLING RV OVER FOG LINE WILL ADV ON CHP"

"[2] DBLU TOYT RAV4 VS WHI TOYT COA - CD"
